info.title: CrowdStrike Falcon API
info.description: CrowdStrike Falcon platform API for endpoint security, threat detection, incident response, and vulnerability management. Provides access to host management, alerts, incidents, IOCs, prevention policies, real-time response, spotlight vulnerabilities, event streams, and threat intelligence.

member_cid.description: For MSSP, lock token to this member CID
